clips.script: POWER ONE-OH-FOUR! KRZR! THE RAZOR! MAXIMUM VOLTAGE, MINIMUM MERCY!
If your speakers aren't smoking, TURN IT UP! Rick Hurricane Hammers on THE RAZOR!
THIS SATURDAY at the Tri-County Fairgrounds! MONSTER TRUCKS! LASERS! A GUY WHO JUMPS OVER STUFF! Five bucks! SATURDAY!
Laser Tag Larry's grand opening! First hundred customers get a FREE HEADBAND! Larry's, next to the mall! OBVIOUSLY!
Security gate DOWN, prize tickets FLYING, and somebody just took the crown! Electric Marquis with AFTER HOURS ARCADE!
Quarters stacked! Leaderboard challenged! Falsetto fully ARMED! Electric Marquis is taking us to the AFTER HOURS ARCADE!
Electric Marquis! AFTER HOURS ARCADE! Pack-Man has filed a formal complaint!
A few dollars, a tip jar, and enough hope to light the whole STATE LINE! Mercy County with AMERICAN DREAM!
She walked into a one-bar town and said, I AM STARTING OVER TONIGHT! Mercy County! AMERICAN DREAM!
Mercy County with AMERICAN DREAM! A little freedom, a little fire, and a LOT of saxophone!
CHECK ONE-TWO! The first generation is here to school the whole nation! Locker Room Kings! CHECK THE RHIME!
All natural! No preservatives! Fresh yesterday, today, AND tomorrow! Locker Room Kings with CHECK THE RHIME!
Locker Room Kings! CHECK THE RHIME! Twelve checks per chorus and every one CLEARED!
Fireworks! Dynamite! A city exploding into OUTER SPACE! Chrome Viper makes love permanent with FOREVER NOW!
When you cannot find the way back, FOLLOW THE HIGHWAY TRACK! Chrome Viper! FOREVER NOW!
Chrome Viper with FOREVER NOW! Blaze, Dagger, Torque, and Kevin remain LEGALLY IMMORTAL!
The doubters said NOT YOU, NOT YET! Stallion Force answered with a stadium full of IMPOSSIBLE DREAMS! GLIMMERS!
The skyline is turning to FIRE and the high road is OPEN! Stallion Force with GLIMMERS!
Stallion Force! GLIMMERS! If you saw the light, congratulations: the impossible is now POSSIBLE!
Brick dust, rain-dark concrete, and one light burning over the whole city! Northbound Saints! HIGH WINDOWS!
Every floor says turn around, but we keep looking UP! Northbound Saints with HIGH WINDOWS!
Northbound Saints! HIGH WINDOWS! Pigeons rising like paper sparks and Hurricane Hammers getting EMOTIONAL!
Cracked mirror! Fog ahead! No stops until the end becomes the BEGINNING! Midnight Assembly with LAST RIDE!
We will never pass this way again, road warriors! Midnight Assembly is taking the LAST RIDE OUT OF TOWN!
Midnight Assembly! LAST RIDE! The rearview mirror survived, but it will never be the same!
Payphone ringing! Basement dancing! Arcade lights fully ENGAGED! Tiffany Blackout with NIGHT IN NEON!
A little too close, a little bit wrong, and ABSOLUTELY electric! Tiffany Blackout! NIGHT IN NEON!
Tiffany Blackout with NIGHT IN NEON! Ten out of ten payphones are still ringing!
Red lights flashing and every step leading into the DARK! Neon Prophecy brings the NIGHTFALL!
Like a bullet from a gun and one second from the end of it ALL! Neon Prophecy! NIGHTFALL!
Neon Prophecy with NIGHTFALL! The city is gritty, the streetlights are sweating, and the pyramid is LOCKED!
The hall phone rings, the rain comes down, and the truth is standing on the OTHER SIDE! Lila Hart! ONLY THE WINDOW KNOWS!
Makeup on the towel! Dress on the chair! One powerhouse voice blowing the curtains OFF! Lila Hart!
Lila Hart with ONLY THE WINDOW KNOWS! The whole world knows NOW!
Wet photographs, a blue sundress, and handwriting that survived the STORM! The Glass Gardens! PICTURES IN THE RAIN!
A shoebox of memories just blew across the garden wall! The Glass Gardens with PICTURES IN THE RAIN!
The Glass Gardens! PICTURES IN THE RAIN! Somebody save the birthday candle!
Hello from the dungeon! Do you READ ME up there? The Low Signals transmit with the RED LIGHT ON!
Phantom, fraud, fever, or flicker from GOD? The Low Signals stay awake for you! RED LIGHT ON!
The Low Signals with RED LIGHT ON! The transmission reached us and the snare hit filed paperwork!
One word breaks the ceiling! One hand turns the key! Paper Empire starts the SMALL REVOLUTIONS!
Office glass! Folded hands! A hundred ways to fall in line and ONE way to break OUT! Paper Empire!
Paper Empire with SMALL REVOLUTIONS! Quiet on the outside, DETONATING underneath!
Smoke! Mirrors! Neon! And an unmistakable grin in the bathroom graffiti! Midnight Copy with THE DARKER!
When the city falls asleep, the silhouettes come ALIVE! Midnight Copy! THE DARKER!
Midnight Copy with THE DARKER! Once you see them, road warriors, you NEVER forget!
[fast joyful gravelly 80s rock DJ] Piano first, heartbreak second, and a final chorus big enough to change the WEATHER! Roxanne Vale! WHEN YOU LOVED ME!
[fast joyful gravelly 80s rock DJ] The storm is passing, the photograph is fading, and Roxanne Vale is about to LEVEL this frequency! WHEN YOU LOVED ME!
[fast gravelly rock-DJ back-announce] Roxanne Vale with WHEN YOU LOVED ME! Hurricane Hammers is NOT crying! That is studio rain!
[fast joyful gravelly 80s rock DJ] Call it a jailbreak! Give them the slip! The Velcro Militia makes the escape WITHOUT A WORD!
[fast joyful gravelly 80s rock DJ] One step! A thousand miles! Two steps and we are walking in SUNSHINE! The Velcro Militia!
[fast gravelly rock-DJ back-announce] The Velcro Militia with WITHOUT A WORD! Their drummer remains a DEFINITELY HUMAN MAN!
[fast joyful gravelly 80s rock DJ] Lipstick in the pocket! Glitter on the sleeve! Shoulder pads at MAXIMUM CAPACITY! Cassie Chrome! YOUR LUCKY JACKET!
[fast joyful gravelly 80s rock DJ] She walked in like she owned the place, and the building signed over the DEED! Cassie Chrome! YOUR LUCKY JACKET!
[fast gravelly rock-DJ back-announce] Cassie Chrome with YOUR LUCKY JACKET! It was lucky before; now it is LEGENDARY!
[urgent loud gravelly 80s DJ] STORM CELL INCOMING! The sky is doing a GUITAR SOLO! Hang on!
[urgent loud gravelly 80s DJ] WASHINGTON, D.C.! Monuments up front, maximum voltage in the rear!
[urgent loud gravelly 80s DJ] FARMLAND! Corn on the left, corn on the right, and THE RAZOR straight down the middle!
[urgent loud gravelly 80s DJ] THE DESERT! It is like the moon, but with SNAKES! Let's GO!
[urgent loud gravelly 80s DJ] LOS ANGELES! Neon, palm trees, and enough hairspray to alter the WEATHER!
[urgent loud gravelly 80s DJ] SAN FRANCISCO! Hills ahead! Gravity just issued a formal CHALLENGE!
[urgent loud gravelly 80s DJ] NEW YORK CITY! The buildings are HUGE! Turn it up until they get BIGGER!
[urgent loud gravelly 80s DJ] WHOA-HO-HO! Somebody unlocked a SKATEBOARD! Radical maneuvers are now AUTHORIZED!
[urgent loud gravelly 80s DJ] TWO WHEELS! ONE ENGINE! ZERO MERCY! The motorcycle is UNLOCKED!
